title: Implement Grouped-Query Attention in MultiheadAttention
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

Llama 3 8B uses 32 query heads with only 8 KV heads (ratio 4:1). Current ferrotorch-nn/src/attention.rs MultiheadAttention (line 37+) has a single num_heads parameter and no repeat_kv logic.

Work:
- Add num_kv_heads: Option<usize> param to MultiheadAttention::new (and a MultiheadAttention::with_gqa constructor). When None, defaults to num_heads (MHA behavior preserved).
- Project K and V with n_kv_heads * head_dim output dim instead of n_heads * head_dim.
- Before attention scores, broadcast K/V from [B, n_kv_heads, S, D] to [B, n_heads, S, D] via repeat_kv. Implement as stride-broadcast where possible (avoids data copy); fall back to explicit repeat for the GPU path initially.
- Gradient path: repeat_kv reduction in backward is a sum over the replicated group.

Acceptance:
- New test: MultiheadAttention with num_heads=32, num_kv_heads=8, forward on random input matches PyTorch nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention(is_causal=True) after K/V repeat within 1e-5 (f32).
- Existing tests still pass (MHA default path unchanged).

Hard blocker for Llama 3 8B.
